blocks.title: Action Plan
blocks.body: Prioritize growth facets: {{facts.top_growth_facets_text}}. Start with one smallest action, then place it into a fixed rhythm; over time, turn it into a stable habit. Break action into behavior, attitude, and environment so it does not stay stuck at the motivation layer.
